about.p1: Founded in 2019 in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, NOVARISE Trading and Contracting Company has emerged as a trusted partner for the region's largest industrial, petrochemical and infrastructure megaprojects.
about.p2Brands: Saudi Aramco, SABIC, Samsung Engineering, Hyundai E&C and Doosan

faq.desc: Procurement, mobilization, certifications, equipment — the questions clients most often raise during pre-qualification.
faq.talkTitle:
Talk directly to our
commercial team.
faq.talkDesc: We respond to RFQs and pre-qualification packs within one business day.

items.q: Is NOVARISE pre-qualified with Saudi Aramco and SABIC?
items.a: Yes. We hold active vendor approvals with Saudi Aramco, SABIC, Ma'aden and several EPC majors operating in the Kingdom. Our QA/QC, HSE and commercial documentation is pre-cleared for direct purchase orders and sub-contracting scopes.

items.q: How quickly can you mobilize manpower to a site?
items.a: For standard scopes we typically have certified crews on site within 14–21 days of a signed RFQ. For emergency turnarounds and shutdowns we maintain a stand-by bench that can deploy in under 96 hours.

items.q: What trades and disciplines do you supply?
items.a: Welders (6G, TIG, MIG), pipe-fitters, riggers, scaffolders (Aramco-certified), electricians, instrumentation technicians, mechanical fitters, HVAC crews, civil labor and supervisory staff. All third-party certified where the scope requires.

items.q: Do you rent equipment, or only supply manpower?
items.a: Both. We own and maintain a fleet of cranes (up to 250T), manlifts, telehandlers, generators, compressors and welding machines. Equipment can be rented bare or with certified operators bundled.

items.q: What is your safety track record?
items.a: ISO 45001:2018 certified. We have logged 12M+ safe man-hours across recent megaprojects with an LTIFR consistently below the regional industry benchmark. Full HSE statistics are shared in pre-qualification packs on request.

items.q: Are you compliant with Saudization and local-content rules?
items.a: Yes — we are aligned with Vision 2030 localization targets, actively grow our Saudi national workforce, and maintain a Nitaqat status that supports clients' own local-content scorecards.

items.q: How do I request a quote or start a vendor evaluation?
items.a: Send your scope, location and indicative timeline to our commercial team via the contact form below. We respond to RFQs within one business day and can issue a full pre-qualification pack the same week.

hero.title: Build the Kingdom's Future With Us.

why.lead: We invest in the people who build the Kingdom. Certified training, safe sites, on-time wages and real career progression — because reputation is built on how we treat our team.

hero.title: About NOVARISE
hero.description: Founded in 2019 in Riyadh, NOVARISE Trading and Contracting has grown into a multi-vertical industrial partner trusted by Saudi Aramco, SABIC and leading EPC majors across the Kingdom.

profile.lead: NOVARISE Trading and Contracting Company is a Saudi-registered enterprise headquartered in Riyadh, delivering integrated industrial solutions across the Kingdom's most demanding sectors — oil & gas, petrochemicals, power, civil infrastructure and heavy equipment.
profile.bodyStart: Established in 2019, we operate as a single accountable partner for clients who need certified workforce, owned equipment and end-to-end contracting under one commercial umbrella. Our QA/QC, HSE and commercial documentation is pre-cleared with
profile.bodyClients: Saudi Aramco, SABIC, Ma'aden, Samsung Engineering, Hyundai E&C and Doosan
profile.bodyEnd: , enabling rapid mobilization to greenfield, brownfield and turnaround scopes.

ceo.name: MD Mamun Miaji
ceo.quoteStart: When we founded NOVARISE in 2019, we had a single conviction —
ceo.quoteHighlight: the Kingdom deserved a contracting partner that delivered with integrity, every single time.
ceo.p1: Today, that conviction has grown into a workforce of more than 2,500 skilled professionals, an owned equipment fleet, and active vendor approvals with the most demanding operators in the region. But our purpose has not changed.
ceo.p2: Every project we mobilize — from a major Aramco turnaround to a SABIC plant expansion — is built on the same foundation: certified people, certified equipment, transparent commercial conduct, and an HSE culture that refuses to compromise.
ceo.p3: As Saudi Arabia accelerates Vision 2030, we are proud to grow alongside the Kingdom — investing in Saudi nationals, in local content, and in the industrial leadership that will define the next decade.

mv.missionTitle: Deliver industrial excellence — every site, every shift.
mv.missionBody: To provide Saudi Arabia's industrial and infrastructure sectors with certified manpower, dependable equipment and end-to-end contracting that meet the most rigorous safety, quality and commercial standards.
mv.visionTitle: To be the Kingdom's most trusted industrial contracting partner.
mv.visionBody: We aspire to stand among the leading Saudi-owned trading and contracting companies — recognized for engineering integrity, operational reliability and an unwavering commitment to Vision 2030.
visionPoints: A workforce engineered for the next decade

hero.title: Our Services
hero.description: End-to-end industrial solutions under a single accountable partner — from civil construction and power-plant works to manpower, equipment, IT and materials trading. One commercial umbrella, one quality standard.

civil.title: Civil Construction
civil.tagline: Industrial civil works, engineered to megaproject standards.
civil.lead: Foundations, structural concrete, industrial buildings and site infrastructure for the Kingdom's most demanding sites.
civil.intro: From greenfield refinery plots to brownfield expansions inside live SABIC plants, our civil teams deliver concrete, rebar, structural steel and site works to QA/QC standards pre-cleared by Saudi Aramco, SABIC, Ma'aden and the major EPC contractors operating across the Kingdom.

subServices.title: Heavy Foundations & Piling
subServices.desc: Pile caps, raft foundations and deep foundations for industrial loads.

subServices.title: Structural Concrete
subServices.desc: Formwork, rebar fixing and high-grade concrete pours to ACI / ASTM specs.

subServices.title: Steel Structure Erection
subServices.desc: Pre-engineered buildings, pipe racks and process structures.

subServices.title: Industrial Buildings
subServices.desc: Warehouses, workshops, control rooms and substation buildings.

subServices.title: Roads, Paving & Grading
subServices.desc: Site preparation, asphalt, kerbing and internal plant roads.

subServices.title: Drainage & Underground Utilities
subServices.desc: Storm drainage, sewerage and underground service corridors.

process.title: Inquiry & Site Survey
process.desc: BOQ review, joint site walk-down and constraint mapping with the client engineering team.

process.title: Method Statement & Approvals
process.desc: MS, ITP and HSE plan submission for client / EPC approval before mobilization.

process.title: Mobilization
process.desc: Crews, equipment and site facilities mobilized to schedule with full QA/QC documentation.

process.title: Execution & Handover
process.desc: Daily progress reporting, third-party inspection and snag-free handover with as-built documentation.

faqs.q: Can NOVARISE work inside live operating plants?
faqs.a: Yes. Our crews are trained on permit-to-work systems used by Aramco, SABIC and Ma'aden, including hot-work, confined-space and isolation procedures required for brownfield work.

faqs.q: What is your typical mobilization timeline for civil works?
faqs.a: Standard mobilization is 14–21 days for medium-size scopes. Emergency or shutdown support can be mobilized within 96 hours from existing fleet and crews.

faqs.q: Do you self-perform or sub-contract concrete works?
faqs.a: Concrete, rebar, formwork and structural steel erection are self-performed by our owned crews. Specialty scopes such as post-tensioning are delivered with audited specialist partners.

faqs.q: Which QA/QC standards do you work to?
faqs.a: ACI 318, ASTM, BS EN, plus client-specific standards including SAES-Q-001 (Aramco), SABIC SES and Royal Commission specifications for Jubail and Yanbu.

power.title: Power Plants
power.tagline: Power generation & electrical infrastructure, end to end.
power.lead: EPC support, substations, switchyards and plant maintenance — built to keep the Kingdom's grid running.
power.intro: We support utility-scale and captive power projects with installation, testing and commissioning of substations, transformers and switchyards. Our electrical crews handle MV/HV cable laying, terminations and ongoing plant maintenance under live operating conditions across SEC, Marafiq and IPP assets.

subServices.title: Substations & Switchyards
subServices.desc: Installation, testing and commissioning up to 380 kV.

subServices.title: MV / HV Cable Works
subServices.desc: Cable laying, jointing and terminations to IEC standards.

subServices.title: Transformer Installation
subServices.desc: Power transformers, dry-type and oil-filled, with on-site testing.

subServices.title: Testing & Commissioning
subServices.desc: Protection relay, partial discharge and SAT/FAT support.

subServices.title: Plant Maintenance
subServices.desc: Planned and emergency maintenance under live operations.

subServices.title: EPC Sub-contracting
subServices.desc: Specialist support to global EPCs on power and utility scopes.

process.title: Scope & Single-line Review
process.desc: Engineering review of SLDs, cable schedules and protection coordination.

process.title: Method & Safety Plan
process.desc: LOTO, energization sequence and HSE plan agreed with operations.

process.title: Installation
process.desc: Equipment install, cabling and pre-commissioning with daily QA records.

process.title: Testing & Energization
process.desc: Protection testing, SAT and witnessed energization with as-built handover.

faqs.q: What voltage levels are you certified to work on?
faqs.a: Our electrical division handles up to 380 kV transmission, including substation construction, GIS commissioning and cable jointing under SEC and IEC standards.

faqs.q: Do you provide testing and commissioning teams independently?
faqs.a: Yes. We supply dedicated T&C teams with calibrated instruments for protection relay testing, primary injection, partial discharge and SAT support — either bundled with construction or as a standalone service.

faqs.q: Can you support live shutdown work?
faqs.a: Yes. We routinely support refinery, IPP and Marafiq shutdowns with rapid mobilization, full LOTO compliance and 24/7 supervision.

rental.title: Heavy Equipment Rental
rental.tagline: Owned fleet — rented bare or with certified operators.
rental.lead: Cranes up to 250T, manlifts, telehandlers, generators, compressors and welding machines — maintained in-house, dispatched on demand.
rental.intro: No third-party rental delays. Our owned fleet is maintained by in-house mechanics, third-party load-tested annually, and supplied with certified operators where the scope requires. We commit to mobilization timelines you can plan around — even during peak shutdown season.

subServices.title: Mobile & Crawler Cranes
subServices.desc: All-terrain and crawler cranes from 25T up to 250T capacity.

subServices.title: Manlifts & Telehandlers
subServices.desc: Articulated booms, scissor lifts and telehandlers up to 45 m.

subServices.title: Forklifts & Material Handlers
subServices.desc: Diesel and electric forklifts for plant and warehouse handling.

subServices.title: Generators & Compressors
subServices.desc: Diesel gensets 50–1500 kVA and air compressors with full PMS.

subServices.title: Welding & Cutting Machines
subServices.desc: Welding plants, plasma cutters and rectifiers with consumables.

subServices.title: Operator-Bundled Options
subServices.desc: Certified operators, banksmen and riggers bundled on request.

process.title: Lift / Power Plan Review
process.desc: Joint review of lift plans, power load schedules or rental scope with client engineers.

process.title: Equipment Reservation
process.desc: Equipment held against project schedule with documented availability commitment.

process.title: Mobilization & Inspection
process.desc: Pre-dispatch inspection, third-party certificates and on-site handover to client.

process.title: On-call Support
process.desc: 24/7 mechanical support, planned PMS and rapid replacement on breakdown.

faqs.q: Can you provide certified operators with the equipment?
faqs.a: Yes. Aramco, TUV and OSHA-certified crane operators, riggers and banksmen are available bundled with the equipment or independently.

faqs.q: How quickly can equipment be dispatched?
faqs.a: From our Riyadh and Dammam yards, standard equipment can be on-site within 24–72 hours. Specialized cranes are scheduled per the client's lift plan.

faqs.q: What happens if a unit breaks down on site?
faqs.a: We provide 24/7 mechanical support and guarantee like-for-like replacement within agreed SLAs to minimize downtime.

manpower.title: Manpower Supply
manpower.tagline: 2,500+ certified workforce on standby — Aramco-grade trades.
manpower.lead: Welders, pipe-fitters, riggers, scaffolders, electricians, instrumentation technicians — multi-disciplinary crews ready in days.
manpower.intro: Every trade we supply is third-party certified where the scope requires. Aramco-certified scaffolders, 6G/TIG/MIG welders, riggers and supervisors are pre-screened, medically fit and visa-compliant — ready to mobilize within 14–21 days, or under 96 hours for shutdown emergencies.

subServices.title: Welders (6G, TIG, MIG)
subServices.desc: ASME IX certified welders for pipeline, structural and pressure work.

subServices.title: Pipe-fitters & Rigger Crews
subServices.desc: Process piping, hydrotest and rigging crews for shutdowns.

subServices.title: Aramco-certified Scaffolders
subServices.desc: Tube & coupler and system scaffold teams for refineries and plants.

subServices.title: Electrical & Instrumentation
subServices.desc: Cable pulling, terminations, loop checks and calibration techs.

subServices.title: HVAC & Mechanical Fitters
subServices.desc: Ductwork, equipment install and rotating-equipment overhaul.

subServices.title: Civil Labor & Supervisors
subServices.desc: Helpers, foremen and site supervisors for civil and finishing scopes.

process.title: Manpower Requisition
process.desc: Trade-by-trade requisition reviewed against availability and certification matrix.

process.title: Pre-screening & Testing
process.desc: Document verification, medical clearance and trade tests where required.

process.title: Mobilization
process.desc: Visa, transport and accommodation handled — workforce on site within agreed window.

process.title: On-site Supervision
process.desc: Site supervisors, timekeeping, payroll and replacement management included.

faqs.q: How fast can you mobilize manpower for a shutdown?
faqs.a: Emergency mobilization within 96 hours from our standby pool. Standard mobilization for new scopes is 14–21 days including documentation and transport.

faqs.q: Are workers third-party certified for Aramco / SABIC sites?
faqs.a: Yes. Welders are ASME IX certified, scaffolders are Aramco SAES-A trained, and electrical / instrumentation techs hold OEM and client-specific certifications.

faqs.q: Do you handle accommodation and transport?
faqs.a: Yes. We operate self-managed camps and transport across Riyadh, Jubail, Yanbu and Dammam regions, included in the supply rate.

faqs.q: What is your replacement policy for unsuitable workers?
faqs.a: Free replacement within 7 days if a worker fails to meet the agreed scope, with documented performance review.

it.title: IT Solutions
it.tagline: Industrial IT, automation and site connectivity.
it.lead: Networking, SCADA support, hardware procurement and digital infrastructure for industrial environments.
it.intro: From remote site connectivity to automation hardware on plant floors, our IT vertical supports the digital backbone of modern industrial operations — networking, SCADA integration support, server & endpoint procurement, and on-site technical staffing across Saudi Arabia.

subServices.title: Industrial Networking
subServices.desc: LAN, WAN, fibre backbone and ruggedized switching for plants.

subServices.title: SCADA & Automation Support
subServices.desc: Integration support and field services for SCADA / DCS systems.

subServices.title: Remote Site Connectivity
subServices.desc: Microwave, VSAT and 4G/5G failover for remote operations.

subServices.title: Servers & Endpoint Hardware
subServices.desc: Procurement, racking, OS install and asset management.

subServices.title: Cybersecurity Hardening
subServices.desc: OT segmentation, firewall config and endpoint protection rollout.

subServices.title: On-site IT Staffing
subServices.desc: Resident IT engineers and helpdesk for camp / plant operations.

process.title: Discovery & Site Audit
process.desc: Network audit, asset inventory and gap analysis against ISA-95 / IEC 62443.

process.title: Design & BoM
process.desc: Topology, hardware BoM and migration plan agreed with the client OT/IT team.

process.title: Deployment
process.desc: Cabling, install, configuration and cutover during planned maintenance windows.

process.title: Operate & Support
process.desc: 24/7 NOC monitoring, on-site engineers and SLA-backed support.

faqs.q: Do you support OT (operational technology) environments, not just IT?
faqs.a: Yes. Our field engineers work across both IT and OT — including SCADA, DCS and PLC ecosystems — with awareness training on IEC 62443 and ISA-95 segmentation principles.

faqs.q: Can you provide resident engineers on long-term contracts?
faqs.a: Yes. We place resident IT and SCADA engineers on 6, 12 and 24-month contracts at plant and camp sites across the Kingdom.

faqs.q: What is your typical response SLA for on-site issues?
faqs.a: Standard SLA is 4-hour on-site response in Riyadh and Eastern Province, with 24/7 remote NOC support included.

trading.title: Materials Trading
trading.tagline: Steel, cement, safety and MEP — sourced reliably.
trading.lead: A trading arm built around the materials our contracting teams already know how to specify, source and inspect.
trading.intro: We trade structural steel, cement, aggregates, PPE, electrical and MEP materials directly to EPCs, sub-contractors and plant operators. Our procurement leverages long-standing supplier relationships across the GCC, Turkey, India and East Asia, with QA inspection and on-time logistics built in.

subServices.title: Structural Steel Sections
subServices.desc: Beams, channels, plates, hollow sections to ASTM / EN standards.

subServices.title: Cement & Aggregates
subServices.desc: OPC, SRC and aggregates supplied to project specs and schedules.

subServices.title: PPE & Safety Equipment
subServices.desc: Hard hats, harnesses, FR clothing and certified gas detectors.

process.title: RFQ & Specification Review
process.desc: Joint review of MTOs and specifications with the client procurement team.

process.title: Sourcing & Vendor Selection
process.desc: Vendor selection from approved list with QA history and lead-time guarantee.

process.title: Inspection & Logistics
process.desc: Third-party inspection at source, freight forwarding and customs clearance.

process.title: Delivery & Documentation
process.desc: On-site delivery with MTCs, COCs and full documentation handed to QA/QC.

faqs.q: Can you supply against EPC and end-client approved vendor lists?
faqs.a: Yes. We work with manufacturer authorizations and approved vendor lists for Aramco, SABIC and the major EPCs operating in the Kingdom.

faqs.q: Do you arrange third-party inspection at source?
faqs.a: Yes. TPI through Bureau Veritas, SGS or client-nominated agencies is arranged at the manufacturer before shipment.

faqs.q: What documentation comes with delivered materials?
faqs.a: Mill Test Certificates (MTCs), Certificates of Conformance (COCs), packing lists and inspection reports — all handed to the client QA/QC team on delivery.

hero.title: Blog & Events
hero.description: Field-tested perspectives on megaproject delivery, safety culture and the strategic shifts shaping Saudi Arabia's industrial landscape — plus the events where our team will be on the ground.

events.titleA: Meet us at the Kingdom's most important
events.sub: Conferences, exhibitions, site visits and webinars where our leadership shares what's working — and where you can meet our project team in person.

newsletter.sub: Case studies, equipment market signals, safety insights and Vision 2030 updates — curated for project leaders, procurement heads and EPC executives.
newsletter.footnote: One email a month. No spam. Unsubscribe anytime.
newsletter.successSub: Look out for your first brief — straight from our leadership desk.

novarise-vision-2030-megaprojects.title: Inside Saudi Arabia's Megaproject Decade: How Vision 2030 is Reshaping Industrial Contracting
novarise-vision-2030-megaprojects.excerpt: From NEOM to the Red Sea Project, the Kingdom's industrial ambition is rewriting the rules of EPC contracting. We unpack what this means for manpower, equipment, and supply chains over the next five years.

zero-harm-culture-aramco-sites.title: Building a Zero-Harm Culture on Aramco Sites
zero-harm-culture-aramco-sites.excerpt: Behind every LTI-free milestone is a system. Here's how NOVARISE engineers safety into daily site operations for tier-1 operators.

case-study-jubail-power-substation.title: Case Study: Delivering a 132kV Substation in Jubail — 11 Days Ahead of Schedule
case-study-jubail-power-substation.excerpt: How an integrated team of 240 certified workers, owned cranes, and a parallel commissioning approach cut critical-path time by 14%.

heavy-equipment-rental-trends-2026.title: The 2026 Heavy Equipment Rental Outlook for KSA's Industrial Belt
heavy-equipment-rental-trends-2026.excerpt: Manlift demand up 38%. Crawler crane utilization at 91%. A data-driven look at what megaproject contractors should plan for.

certified-manpower-mobilization-72-hours.title: From Request to Site in 72 Hours: Our Manpower Mobilization Playbook
certified-manpower-mobilization-72-hours.excerpt: Pre-cleared visas, in-house certification pipeline, and a 2,500-strong workforce — the operational stack behind rapid deployment.

civil-construction-mega-foundations.title: Engineering Mega-Foundations: Lessons from a 14,000m³ Industrial Pour
civil-construction-mega-foundations.excerpt: Continuous pour logistics, thermal control, and rebar coordination — what it takes to deliver a flawless mat foundation at scale.

oil-gas-shutdown-readiness.title: Shutdown & Turnaround Readiness: A Tier-1 Vendor's Perspective
oil-gas-shutdown-readiness.excerpt: Mobilizing 600+ skilled workers for a 21-day turnaround window — how preparation, not heroics, defines success.

supply-chain-localization-vision-2030.title: Supply Chain Localization: Sourcing Steel & Cement Inside the Kingdom
supply-chain-localization-vision-2030.excerpt: How in-Kingdom procurement is becoming a competitive moat — and what NOVARISE's trading division is doing to lead it.

psm-process-safety-management.title: Why Process Safety Management is the New Differentiator for KSA Contractors
psm-process-safety-management.excerpt: Beyond LTIR: how PSM maturity is becoming a hard prequalification criterion for Aramco and SABIC vendors.
